summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SecureBridge POC messaging system. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly with proper integration.
passed_tests: POST /api/send - Creates message and returns inbox_url
GET /api/messages - Returns list of all messages with proper structure
GET /api/message/{id} - Returns message and marks as read
Read status change functionality (is_read: false → true)
Send Message form - All fields working with validation
Inbox view - Message list with read/unread indicators (blue dots)
Message Detail view - Content display with Secure Connection badge
Navigation between pages - All buttons working correctly
Frontend-Backend integration - Form submission, data loading, status updates
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (7/7 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all functionality working)
